message:
refactor(capability_witness): replace sort_by with sort_by_key for clarity

Simplify 5 sorting call sites from sort_by(|a, b| a.x().cmp(&b.x()))
to the idiomatic sort_by_key(|a| a.x()) form. This is a Clippy-recommended
pattern that eliminates the manual comparator boilerplate and makes the
sort key immediately visible at the call site. No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
